mapper.select: SELECT id, name, name_cn AS nameCn FROM bangumi_subject where type = #{type} AND (name_cn LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY CASE WHEN name_cn LIKE CONCAT(#{keyword}, '%') THEN 0 WHEN name LIKE CONCAT(#{keyword}, '%') THEN 1 WHEN name_cn LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, `rank` IS NULL, `rank` ASC LIMIT #{limit}
